name: git-workflow diverged-from-main check warns when local branch is ahead-or-behind the remote main
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/git-workflow/recommend.sh" --check diverged-from-main --diverged-stub ahead=10,behind=20 2>out.txt && grep -q 'warning=diverged-from-main' out.txt && grep -q 'ahead=10' out.txt && grep -q 'behind=20' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
